title: [MTR4] StarTrain B400
description: Adds the StarTrain BC400, a fictional light rail vehicle, to MTR4.
body:
The StarTrain BC400 is a high-floor/low-floor light rail vehicle built by StarTrain in 2003, and 65 trains entered service in San Marvin in 2004.

This train requires Minecraft Transit Railway version 4.0.4 or higher for it to work properly!
